error_signature: broken image icon in binary preview
title: Broken image preview in Telegram Trigger node
symptom: When executing a workflow with the Telegram Trigger node in production, the binary data appears broken, and subsequent nodes cannot process the image correctly.
not_this_if: Workflow runs correctly in manual execution mode
root_cause: The issue arises because the Telegram Trigger node's 'Download Images/Files' option may not be handling the binary data correctly in production. This leads to the image not being saved properly, resulting in a broken preview and processing errors in subsequent nodes.
fix_steps: Disable the 'Download Images/Files' option in the Telegram Trigger node
Add a Telegram Get a File node to retrieve the file using the file_id
Send the binary file to the sub-workflow as an object
agent_instruction: Disable the 'Download Images/Files' option and use the Telegram Get a File node to retrieve the image.
